---
title: "Learn about Open Science on Coursera"
pagetitle: "Learn about Open Science on Coursera"
date: "2025-01-04"
date-title: "Date Added"
author: "Austin Thompson"
author-title: "Contributor"
short-description: "This free Coursera course, *A Starter's Guide to Open Science*, offers a comprehensive introduction to open science practices"
resource-link: "https://www.coursera.org/learn/a-starters-guide-to-open-science#about"
categories:
 - For Scientists
 - Open Access
 - Open Data
 - Open Peer Review
 - Preregistration
 - Open Educational Resources
 - Free
editor: source
---

----
## About this Resource
{{< meta short-description >}}
\

[Visit Resource]({{< meta resource-link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}
